LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KATHRYN KIRKLAND'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $23,539.44 IS CONFIRMED. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED POST-AWARD INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM PLUS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN CONFIRMING THE AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,340.00. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER KIRKLAND, KATHRYN

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER KATHRYN KIRKLAND'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award. Appearances: Philip S. Keith, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 433-1790, appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Molly Hemmeter, Defendant, and opposing party is appearing in Pro Per. Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $23,539.44 IS CONFIRMED. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED POST-AWARD INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM PLUS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN CONFIRMING THE AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,340.00. Petitioner's counsel to submit proposed Order and Judgment for the Court's signature. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Continued To Feb-04-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
